audit_items.proof_trace: EthSigned admission reaches chain::submit_tx through rpc_eth_send_raw_transaction and submit_tx_in, and submit_tx decodes before inserting into seen_tx, tx_store, pending indexes, or queue metadata. For EthSigned, decode_tx calls decode_eth_raw_tx_to_recovered, which enforces non-empty and max-size bounds, rejects unsupported typed transactions, validates chain_id, rejects trailing bytes, and only returns after Signed::recover_signer succeeds; invalid RLP/signature therefore maps to DecodeFailed before enqueue. Stress checks found no alternate EthSigned enqueue path that bypasses this decode boundary, and tests cover invalid signature, wrong or missing chain_id, unsupported 4844/7702, and submit_tx_in decode rejection.
